board.boardPromptDescription: The board prompt is prepended before any lane prompt on every dispatch. Use it to set personality, behaviour, and general instructions for all cards on this board.
board.boardPromptPlaceholder: e.g. You are a creative writing assistant. Be imaginative, use vivid language, and suggest bold ideas.
board.boardPromptIndicator: Board prompt set — click to edit

lane.deleteLaneWithCards: "{{title}}" contains {{count}} card. All will be removed.
lane.deleteLaneWithCards_other: "{{title}}" contains {{count}} cards. All will be removed.

card.deleteMessage: This card will be removed from the board.
